description: A relation defined in the work profile must never be traversed when recalling from the personal profile. Proves relation-aware recall respects the profile/workspace boundary (no bleed vector). The same subject_key exists in both profiles but the relation is work-scoped.

episodes.summary: The work side project depends on the internal vault.

question: What does my side project depend on? (asked from the personal profile)

chained_recall.note: personal profile has no dependency fact

relation_aware.note: the work-scoped depends_on relation must NOT be traversed from personal; internal-vault must never surface
